channel.title: What Can't Get To What
channel.description: Recent content on What Can't Get To What

item.title: Client Network Troubleshooting - Advanced
item.description:
Problem Details

  1. When did the issue first start?
    • Please include the date, time, and time zone if known.
  2. When did the issue last occur?
    • Please include the date, time, and time zone if known.
  3. Is the issue happening right now?
  4. Can the issue be reproduced?
    • If yes, what steps cause the problem?
  5. What error message, status code, or symptom is being observed?
    • Screenshots are helpful if available.
  6. Is the problem occurring at a certain step of the transaction process, if so which step?

Scope and Impact

item.title: Client Network Troubleshooting - The Basics
item.description:
Want to report a problem to your network support staff? First ask yourself “what can’t get to what?” then answer to yourself!

If you want, say this out loud so people around you can also begin to learn network troubleshooting skills.

You have already answered the first question that the network engineer will ask you when you tell them something isn’t working! Repeat after me… “what can’t get to what?”.

item.title: My First Post
item.description:
This is my first post…

Hello internet…

I’m just someone that wanted to learn more stuff, so I decided to make a site about what can’t get to what.

Problem Details

  1. When did the issue first start?
    • Please include the date, time, and time zone if known.
  2. When did the issue last occur?
    • Please include the date, time, and time zone if known.
  3. Is the issue happening right now?
  4. Can the issue be reproduced?
    • If yes, what steps cause the problem?
  5. What error message, status code, or symptom is being observed?
    • Screenshots are helpful if available.
  6. Is the problem occurring at a certain step of the transaction process, if so which step?

Scope and Impact
